deptName: ช่างอากาศยาน
learningOutcomes:
Be able to know, understand, explain and apply knowledge for repair aircraft structure
sheet metal by rivet fastener including sheet metal work repair methods and structure repair
manual and have a good attitude to work neatly, be patience with work, a habit of working
carefully and safety.
objectives:
1. Be able to know and understand the repair aircraft structure sheet metal by rivet
fastener including sheet metal work repair methods and structure repair manual.
2. Be able to explain the repair aircraft structure sheet metal by rivet fastener including
sheet metal work repair methods and structure repair manual.
3. Have a good attitude to work neatly, be patience with work, a habit of working
carefully and safety.
4. Be able to apply knowledge for repair aircraft structure sheet metal by rivet fastener
including sheet metal work repair methods and structure repair manual.
competencies:
1. Describe and codify knowledge about the repair aircraft structure sheet metal by
rivet fastener including sheet metal work repair methods and structure repair manual.
2. Apply knowledge for repair aircraft structure sheet metal by rivet fastener including
sheet metal work repair methods and structure repair manual.
3. Apply their knowledge of for repair aircraft structure sheet metal by rivet fastener
including sheet metal work repair methods and structure repair manual in higher education.
description:
To study and practice about the repair aircraft structure sheet metal by rivet fastener,
rivet joint, rivet space, rivet pitch, rivet tools and inspection of repair joint, rivet lay-out
including sheet metal work repair methods, repair tools and structure repair manual.
